# Data Model

<!-- Generated by /ai-context. Manual edits are overwritten on re-run. -->

## AS IS — Current state

### Entities

#### CertificateInfo (`Models/CertificateInfo.cs`)

In-memory DTO representing a loaded certificate. No database, no persistence — destroyed when the application closes.

| Property | Type | Default | Notes |
|----------|------|---------|-------|
| `Id` | `string` | First 8 chars of `Guid.NewGuid()` uppercase | Auto-generated on construction |
| `DisplayName` | `string` | `string.Empty` | Set to filename or "Certificado Simulado" |
| `Thumbprint` | `string` | `string.Empty` | Real thumbprint from `X509Certificate2.Thumbprint` or `"SIM-{guid}"` prefix |
| `PfxBase64` | `string?` | `null` | Present in DTO definition but never populated in current code |
| `Password` | `string?` | `null` | Present in DTO definition but never populated in current code |
| `IsActive` | `bool` | `false` | Set to `true` on load, `false` on unload |
| `ActivatedAt` | `DateTime?` | `null` | Set to `DateTime.Now` on load |
| `AllowedDomains` | `List<string>` | 4 hardcoded gov.br domains | Rebuilt on each certificate load |
| `BlockedDomains` | `List<string>` | `["google.com", "facebook.com"]` | Rebuilt on each certificate load |

#### DomainRule (`Models/CertificateInfo.cs`)

In-memory entry in the per-certificate domain rule list.

| Property | Type | Default | Notes |
|----------|------|---------|-------|
| `Domain` | `string` | `string.Empty` | The domain pattern matched via `Contains()` |
| `Label` | `string` | `string.Empty` | Display label (set to domain string in current code) |
| `IsBlocked` | `bool` | `false` | `true` = blocked, `false` = allowed |

### Storage

| Aspect | Value |
|--------|-------|
| **Engine** | None — all state is in-memory (`_certificate`, `_currentCert`, `_domainRules` fields on `CertBrokerService`) |
| **Persistence** | None — no file write, no database, no registry. Certificate loaded from PFX bytes; rules derived from `CertificateInfo.AllowedDomains` / `BlockedDomains`. |
| **Migration tool** | Not applicable |
| **Schema location** | Not applicable |

### Cache

No cache layer. All domain rules and certificate state live as private fields on the `CertBrokerService` singleton instance created in `MainWindow.xaml.cs` line 11. State is lost on application close.
